title: Menkooro whiskey
content:
{{Top|fca|leg|notoc=1}} {{Food |image=[[File:Menkooro.jpg]] |name=Menkooro whiskey |origin= |date= |race= |creator= |found= |type=[[Whiskey/Legends|Whiskey]]''[[Dark Force Rising]]'' |description= |animals= |plants= |other= |edible= |inedible= |potable= |nutrition= |effects=Flammable |dishes= |affiliation= }} {{Quote|If we had some bruallki, we could have bruallki and Menkooro—''"
"''—if we had some Menkooro.|[[Talon Karrde]] and [[Aves]]|''[[The Last Command]]''}} '''Menkooro whiskey''' was a [[Alcohol/Legends|bourbon]] that was considered the perfect accompaniment to [[bruallki]].''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' The two were part of an old saying that was sometimes used by [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] when they were seeking a solution to a problem. In [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]], a crate containing Menkooro was in a storeroom on the ''[[Coral Vanda]]'', a luxury [[Casino/Legends|casino]] [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] that operated in the [[Ocean/Legends|oceans]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Pantolomin/Legends|Pantolomin]]. When an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] began [[Orbital bombardment/Legends|firing]] its [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolasers]] at the ''Coral Vanda'' from Pantolomin's [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]], the crate was knocked open, spilling Menkooro [[Whiskey/Legends|whiskey]] onto the storeroom's floor. [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] was present, and fired his [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] into the Menkooro in order to start a fire and escape from a [[Niles Ferrier's wraith|Defel]] that was attacking him. ==Behind the scenes== Menkooro whiskey appeared briefly in [[Timothy Zahn]]'s [[1992]] novel ''[[Dark Force Rising]]''. After being mentioned in the followup novel, [[1993]]'s ''[[The Last Command]]'', it received a visual depiction in the [[Star Wars: Dark Force Rising (comic series)|comic adaptation]] of ''[[Dark Force Rising]]'', released in [[1997]]. ==Appearances== *''[[Dark Force Rising]]'' {{Ab|Dark Force Rising (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}} *[[Dark Force Rising 6|''Dark Force Rising'' 6]] *''[[The Last Command]]'' {{Ab|The Last Command (unabridged audiobook)}} {{Mo}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Menkooro-Whisky }} [[Category:Whiskies]]
